form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior recorded a solid 22.23 over 390m finishing second at this track. Has the ability and can find winning form.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Bendigo to win by 3.5 lengths in 23.97, beating Despicable Andy. Last start finished 4th on April 12 over 435m at Sale behind Dr. Paris beaten 3 lengths (24.86) in a Restricted WIN. Has ability and looks a winning hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked, stumbled and lost ground home straight.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish sixth (22.29) at this track over 390m. Tested under these conditions.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a slick early split and went straight to the front, giving a huge sight but headed late when a 1.3 lengths third (22.42) over 390m at Ballarat. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warrnambool over 390m. Last start finished 5th on April 14 over 410m at Horsham behind Air Speed beaten 6 lengths (23.62) in a Grade 5. Brought a two-start winning streak to an end last time when he missing the frame. Worth another try.
